prompt: When closure threshold favors pressure, choose raise.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits because the closure threshold now favors leverage, so the remaining depth edge should convert into pressure.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is better when the river-depth threshold still favors pressure, because stack depth and price keep the leverage edge alive.
